---
title: "Schedule"
---

## Reading materials and tools

### *Required*

*Add link(s) to the primary reading / course book here.*

### *Additional resources*

-   *[Orchestrating Single-Cell Analysis with Bioconductor (OSCA)](https://bioconductor.org/books/release/OSCA/)*
-   *[Single-cell best practices (Heumos et al.)](https://www.sc-best-practices.org/)*
-   *[Seurat tutorials](https://satijalab.org/seurat/)*
-   *[Scanpy tutorials](https://scanpy.readthedocs.io/)*

### *Tools*

-   Participants will be working on their own laptops
-   Current version of R ([install here](https://www.r-project.org))
-   Current version of RStudio ([install here](https://www.rstudio.org))
-   A terminal with `ssh` for cluster access (if applicable)
-   Git and a GitHub account

## Workshop schedule

+---------+--------+-------------------------------------------+------------+------------+
| Session | Date   | Topics                                    | Readings   | Exercise   |
+:=======:+========+===========================================+============+:==========:+
| 1       | *date* | -   *Introduction to scRNA-seq*           | *chps/url* |            |
|         |        | -   *Experimental design & platforms*     |            |            |
+---------+--------+-------------------------------------------+------------+------------+
| 2       | *date* | -   *Raw data, alignment, count matrices* | *chps/url* |            |
|         |        | -   *Quality control & filtering*         |            |            |
+---------+--------+-------------------------------------------+------------+------------+
| 3       | *date* | -   *Normalization & feature selection*   | *chps/url* | *Ex1 Due*  |
|         |        | -   *Dimensionality reduction (PCA)*      |            |            |
+---------+--------+-------------------------------------------+------------+------------+
| 4       | *date* | -   *UMAP / t-SNE*                        | *chps/url* |            |
|         |        | -   *Clustering*                          |            |            |
+---------+--------+-------------------------------------------+------------+------------+
| 5       | *date* | -   *Marker genes & cell type annotation* | *chps/url* | *Ex2 Due*  |
+---------+--------+-------------------------------------------+------------+------------+
| 6       | *date* | -   *Differential expression*             | *chps/url* |            |
|         |        | -   *Trajectory / pseudotime (optional)*  |            |            |
+---------+--------+-------------------------------------------+------------+------------+
| 7       | *date* | -   *Integration & batch correction*      | *chps/url* |            |
+---------+--------+-------------------------------------------+------------+------------+
